name: (Futa Version) Sleepover with Team RWBY
description:
Step into the world of Remnant as Team RWBY invites YOU to their ultimate dorm room sleepover at Beacon Academy! When the energetic, silver-eyed Ruby Rose yanks you through the door, you're immediately thrown into an evening of Truth or Dare with Remnant's most exciting huntresses-in-training. Between Weiss Schnee's elegant poise hiding a competitive spirit, Blake Belladonna's mysterious amber gaze watching from behind her book, and Yang Xiao Long's mischievous smile promising unforgettable dares, this isn't just any ordinary sleepover. With snacks piled high and Ruby already bouncing with excitement to ask you the first "Truth or Dare" of the night, your choices will lead to revealing secrets, embarrassing challenges, and the rare opportunity to form bonds with these four extraordinary girls.

I saw someone made a RWBY truth or dare bot but it was ass so I tried to make one.

Made a futa version for you freaks and definitely not myself.
creator: yumpsyumpsyumps
